title: Human Genetics Comprehensive Examination Question Bank
description: 300 Multiple Choice Questions and 200 Fill-in-the-Blank Questions covering Chromosomes, DNA Replication, and Transcription

multiple_choice_questions.question: Chromosomes are threadlike structures located in the:

options.B: Nucleus of animal and plant cells
